meta.title: Cyber Norms and Glass Houses
meta.description: A clip from Dale's interview with Sandworm author Andy Greenberg. A bit of hypocrisy with USG wanting others to observe red lines for cyber attacks and yet not wanting to take anything off the table for their own use.
